weather.summary: Saturday: 16°C, few clouds. Sunday: 14°C, clear sky

metadata.greeting: This weekend is shaping up to be fantastic for outdoor adventures! I've found some wonderful free activities in East London and beyond, perfect for a 3-year-old to explore and discover. Get ready for some fun in the sun!

activities.title: Library Club at the Hackney Showroom
activities.description: Reading corner and diverse book-pairing service
activities.whyItWorks: Free, drop-in, and suitable for a wide age range. A relaxed space for enjoying books.

transport.fromHackney: Bus or Overground to Hackney Downs or Hackney Central
transport.tip: Check term times before heading out

activities.title: Young V&A
activities.description: Interactive museum for children with play areas, exhibits and workshops.
activities.whyItWorks: Hands-on exhibits, a sandpit, and dressing-up areas make it engaging for toddlers.

transport.fromHackney: Central Line to Bethnal Green
transport.tip: Check for special events that may require booking

activities.title: Sound Explorers at Young V&A
activities.description: Sound Explorers is a drop-in session at the Young V&A.
activities.whyItWorks: Specifically designed for young children, encouraging sensory exploration

transport.fromHackney: Central Line to Bethnal Green
transport.tip: Check for special events that may require booking

activities.title: Mini Play for Babies
activities.description: Workshop for babies at the Young V&A.
activities.whyItWorks: Specifically designed for babies, encouraging sensory exploration

transport.fromHackney: Central Line to Bethnal Green
transport.tip: Check for special events that may require booking

activities.title: Mini Play for Toddlers
activities.description: Workshop for Toddlers at the Young V&A.
activities.whyItWorks: Specifically designed for toddlers, encouraging sensory exploration and play

transport.fromHackney: Central Line to Bethnal Green
transport.tip: Check for special events that may require booking

activities.title: SEND Play
activities.description: Drop-in play session at the Young V&A designed for children with Special Education Needs and Disabilities.
activities.whyItWorks: Offers a safe and inclusive play environment

transport.fromHackney: Central Line to Bethnal Green
transport.tip: Check for special events that may require booking

activities.title: Library Activities
activities.description: Check local Hackney libraries for free activities like story time, rhyme time, and craft sessions.
activities.whyItWorks: Free, local, and encourages a love of reading

transport.fromHackney: Walk or local bus
transport.tip: Check the Hackney Council website for library locations and schedules

activities.title: Discover Children's Story Centre
activities.description: Storytelling and creative play space for children.
activities.whyItWorks: Interactive exhibits and activities stimulate imagination and creativity

transport.fromHackney: Central Line to Stratford
transport.tip: Book in advance to guarantee entry

activities.title: Natural History Museum
activities.description: Explore dinosaurs, animals, and natural wonders at this iconic museum.
activities.whyItWorks: Dinosaur exhibits and interactive displays capture children's imaginations.

transport.fromHackney: Tube: Overground to Highbury & Islington, then Victoria Line to Green Park, then Piccadilly Line to South Kensington
transport.tip: Arrive early to avoid crowds

activities.title: Science Museum
activities.description: Interactive exhibits and displays about science and technology.
activities.whyItWorks: Wonderlab offers hands-on experiences for kids.

transport.fromHackney: Tube: Overground to Highbury & Islington, then Victoria Line to Green Park, then Piccadilly Line to South Kensington
transport.tip: Check for special events and book Wonderlab in advance

activities.title: V&A Museum
activities.description: Explore art, design, and fashion from around the world.
activities.whyItWorks: Backpacks with activities for children aged 5-12 are available.

transport.fromHackney: Tube: Overground to Highbury & Islington, then Victoria Line to Green Park, then Piccadilly Line to South Kensington
transport.tip: Check for family activities and workshops

activities.title: British Museum
activities.description: Discover world cultures and history through fascinating artifacts and exhibits.
activities.whyItWorks: Activity trails and museum backpacks make it engaging for children.

transport.fromHackney: Tube: Central Line to Tottenham Court Road or Northern Line to Goodge Street
transport.tip: Visit the family desk for activity packs

activities.title: Horniman Museum and Gardens
activities.price: Free (Aquarium and Butterfly House have a charge)
activities.description: Explore natural history, anthropology, and musical instruments, plus gardens and animals.
activities.whyItWorks: Gardens, animals, and a hands-on base make it great for toddlers.

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Forest Hill
transport.tip: Check for family workshops and nature trails

activities.title: Southbank Centre
activities.description: A world-famous arts centre on the river with festivals, performances, and free activities.
activities.whyItWorks: Lots of open space for running around, plus family-friendly events and activities.

transport.fromHackney: Tube: Overground to Shoreditch High Street, then walk to Liverpool Street for Central Line to Waterloo
transport.tip: Check the Southbank Centre website for the daily schedule

activities.title: Golders Hill Park Zoo
activities.description: Small zoo with a variety of animals, plus a playground and gardens.
activities.whyItWorks: Free, outdoor, and has animals and a playground

transport.fromHackney: Tube: Northern Line to Golders Green
transport.tip: Pack a picnic to enjoy in the park

activities.title: Crystal Palace Park Dinosaurs
activities.description: Explore the dinosaur sculptures and enjoy the playground and park.
activities.whyItWorks: Dinosaurs, outdoor space, and a playground

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Crystal Palace
transport.tip: Combine with a visit to the playground and maze

activities.title: Unicorn Theatre Productions
activities.description: A custom-built children's theatre offering a range of performances for different age groups.
activities.whyItWorks: Performances specifically designed for young audiences

transport.fromHackney: Tube: Overground to Shoreditch High Street, then walk to Liverpool Street for Central line to Bank, then Northern line to London Bridge, then walk
transport.tip: Check the Unicorn Theatre website for age recommendations and showtimes

activities.title: Polka Theatre Productions
activities.description: Dedicated children's theatre with two performance spaces, a garden, and a playground.
activities.whyItWorks: Offers a wide range of shows and activities for young children

transport.fromHackney: Tube: Overground to Highbury & Islington, then Victoria Line to Green Park, then Jubilee Line to Waterloo, then train to Wimbledon.
transport.tip: Check the Polka Theatre website for show schedules and age recommendations

activities.title: Inside Aardman: Wallace & Gromit and Friends at Young V&A
activities.description: Explore the world of Wallace & Gromit and other Aardman characters.
activities.whyItWorks: Interactive exhibits and iconic characters

transport.fromHackney: Central Line to Bethnal Green
transport.tip: Book tickets in advance

activities.title: The Lion Inside
activities.description: Show at Unicorn Theatre for ages 3-7.
activities.whyItWorks: Show at Unicorn Theatre for ages 3-7.

transport.fromHackney: Tube: Overground to Shoreditch High Street, then walk to Liverpool Street for Central line to Bank, then Northern line to London Bridge, then walk
transport.tip: Check the Unicorn Theatre website for age recommendations and showtimes

activities.title: Kew Gardens - Bluey at Kew
activities.price: Included with admission to Kew Gardens
activities.description: Bluey-themed interactive activities for the whole family, including a Play Zone with 3D installations and the chance to meet the Bluey character.
activities.whyItWorks: Interactive and fun for all the family. Great if your child is a Bluey fan.

transport.fromHackney: Tube: Overground to Richmond
transport.tip: Book tickets in advance

activities.title: Hamley's Easter Happenings
activities.description: Lots of fun Easter happenings at London's biggest toy shop including Chef Chocco's Chocolatiers Puppet Show, Hamley's Rainbow ribbon parade, Storytime, Hamley's Dragon Easter egg hunt… and more!
activities.whyItWorks: Puppet shows, parades and egg hunts

transport.fromHackney: Tube: Victoria Line to Oxford Circus
transport.tip: Check schedule in advance

activities.title: The Postal Museum - New Jolly Postman Exhibition
activities.description: Interactive exhibition celebrating 40 years of Janet and Allan Ahlberg famous children's book.
activities.whyItWorks: interactive and familiar

transport.fromHackney: Bus, Tube, Train
transport.tip: Book tickets in advance

activities.title: Lindt Gold Bunny Hunt at Hampton Court Palace
activities.price: Included with admission to Hampton Court Palace
activities.description: Roam around the gardens and find hidden Lindt Gold Bunny statues to win a chocolate treat.
activities.whyItWorks: Roam around the gardens and find hidden Lindt Gold Bunny statues to win a chocolate treat.

transport.fromHackney: Train from Waterloo to Hampton Court
transport.tip: Book tickets in advance
